/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Imaginate.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Imaginate.dir/src/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Imaginate.dir/external/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/Imaginate.dir/src/ImageLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Imaginate.dir/src/GameObject.cpp.o -o Imaginate   -L/Users/jared/Desktop/Imaginate/external/glfw/lib-universal  -L/Users/jared/Desktop/Imaginate/external/assimp/bin  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/jared/Desktop/Imaginate/external/glfw/lib-universal -Wl,-rpath,/Users/jared/Desktop/Imaginate/external/assimp/bin -lglfw3 -lassimp -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
